# Caring Nannies

> San Antonio and Austin's premier family care agency since 1989.

Caring Nannies is a referral-based nanny agency serving families in San Antonio, Austin, and surrounding areas of South Texas. Founded in 1989, we connect families with screened, vetted, and guaranteed caregivers.

## Services

- **Full-Time Nanny Placement**: Dedicated in-home care for 25+ hours per week. Your nanny becomes a trusted part of the family, managing daily routines, activities, and developmental milestones.
- **Part-Time Nanny Placement**: Flexible care on your schedule. Ideal for families who need consistent support several days a week.
- **Night Nanny**: Overnight care and newborn support so parents can rest. Experienced with infants and professional sleep training.
- **After-School Care**: Reliable afternoon coverage for school-age children. Pickup, homework help, activities, and dinner prep.
- **Babysitting Membership**: Monthly membership giving families on-demand access to a pool of screened babysitters for date nights and events.
- **Senior Care**: Compassionate in-home care for aging parents and loved ones.

## How It Works

1. **Consultation**: Tell us about your family, schedule, and what matters most.
2. **Curated Matching**: We handpick 2-4 candidates from our vetted roster based on your specific needs.
3. **Meet & Interview**: Interview shortlisted candidates in person. We coordinate everything.
4. **Placement & Guarantee**: Your caregiver starts, and we stay involved with 30-day and 90-day check-ins. Every placement is fully guaranteed.

## Contact

- Phone: (210) 666-2669
- Website: https://caringnannies.com
- Family Portal: https://app.caringnannies.com/portal/family
- Nanny Application: https://app.caringnannies.com/portal/nanny

## Areas Served

San Antonio, Austin, Alamo Heights, Stone Oak, Terrell Hills, Castle Hills, Boerne, Schertz, and surrounding South Texas communities.

## About

Caring Nannies has been serving San Antonio families since 1989. We are a referral agency, not a staffing agency. The family employs the nanny directly. We earn referral and placement fees from families for our matchmaking, screening, and coordination services. All candidates undergo thorough background checks, reference verification, and in-person interviews before being placed with families.
